notableEvents.label: Randy Arozarena GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena grounds into a double play, third baseman Austin Riley to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Josh Naylor out at 2nd. Randy Arozarena out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder singles on a ground ball to left fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Josh Naylor to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Connor Joe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Connor Joe walks. Rob Refsnyder to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Sean Murphy GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Sean Murphy grounds into a double play, third baseman Leo Rivas to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Mike Yastrzemski out at 2nd. Sean Murphy out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Michael Harris II pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Harris II strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith singles on a line drive to left fielder Randy Arozarena.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
